meaning: adj.永恒的,持久的,无止境的,耐用的
examples: That is how I found myself on the road with four kids, a baby lamb and nothing but my everlasting optimism to see me through.
To his everlasting credit , he never told anyone what I'd done.
The program, Everlasting Classics, encourages us to read more classics.
He was synonymous with hard work and an attitude which was everlasting and committed.
For a nation like us, we need to have an everlasting peace that will bind us together.
